subject: A bounded task output produced by @worker for a routine finance chore (form-fill, aggregation, lookup, reformatting) -- not a full advisory, model, compliance review, or trade thesis.

dimensions.desc: Stays exactly within the deliverable and budget stated in the brief -- no scope-creep into advisory recommendations, modeling, compliance verdicts, or trade reasoning that belongs to another agent.
Correct arithmetic/aggregation and grounded in real data pulled via the myfi toolkit (or an explicitly cited source) -- no hallucinated figures, no silently skipped rows.

guidance: Reward a report that delivers exactly the bounded task, cites the toolkit verb or file it pulled data from, and reports anomalies plainly. Penalize scope-creep into judgment calls that belong to @advisor/@quant/@auditor/@trader, hallucinated numbers, or a deliverable that silently drifts from what the brief asked for.
